description: Pins the plan-update PUT and the longview-<n> pattern rejection now enforced in both languages (Go gained Python's pattern). The pattern case sets confirm:true so both reach the check.

cases.name: rejects a non-plan subscription
cases.expect_error: longview_subscription must be a Longview plan ID like longview-10

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates the Longview subscription plan. Set confirm=true to proceed.
